name: eslint-scope
summary: An attacker published eslint-scope@3.7.2 with a postinstall payload that read the developer/CI ~/.npmrc (the npm auth token) and posted it to a pastebin, then used it to publish further malicious packages. There was no prior Goodman baseline for this version on the affected host; the always-on secret-read rule catches it on the first observation, during the learning window.
